title: Corrected in Ink
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing2: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing3: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to R+L. Ears react to G+S. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have R+ AND G−. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [1, 3]. Alch: ing1→pnP, ing3→pNn.
